text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking down the hallway, I
notice Rice Shower looking rather gloomy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... What do I do? What do I do...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Nothing happened, but... Well, the weather
forecast says there'll be heavy rain tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was planning to train a lot tomorrow since I've
got a race coming up, but now... Oh, I don't know
what to do!
choice_data_list: Rent out the gymnasium and run there!
Make some sunshine dolls to ward off the rain!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't be the same as running on a track, but I
suggest she train in the gym so she can practice
her acceleration in straight sprints.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But if I rent it out for myself, doesn't that mean
nobody else will be able to use the gym?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest that she invite other Umamusume to
train with her, and she seems much happier with
the idea after that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that makes sense! Thanks for your
suggestion! Ehehe, I'm excited to run tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, her training session goes off
without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea! I'm sure the skies will clear if
we make a lot of them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Let's make really cute ones. I want to make a blue
one...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! But... No, this won't work...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If I make them, they'll probably just bring a whole
storm down on us instead...
choice_data_list:
Don't worry. I'll make a whole bunch of them
too.

Don't worry. I'll make a whole bunch of them
too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Really? What a relief! I'm sure they'll work fine if you do it! I'll make the best sunshine dolls I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The skies must have heard Rice Shower's pleas,
because there isn't a single cloud to be seen the
next day.
